steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage emphasizes the mosque's massive scale—it accommodates approximately 17,000 people. The blank requires a word describing the visual impression created by such size.

steps.title: Match the word to the visual effect
steps.content: Imposing means impressive and commanding in appearance, which directly captures how such a vast structure would strike an observer. Idealized, intricate, and illusory address unrelated qualities: perfection, visual complexity, and deception. That matches choice D — D is correct.
